name: AIR-DROW Export Preview & Save Polish Edition
delivery: This complete source package is ready for npm ci and npm run vercel:build. The generated public folder is included for inspection; deployment output is always regenerated from package-lock.json and web during build.
iconReplacement: The complete local icon package remains installed. Scanner status marks use resilient inline vectors for Android, while the editable local icon package remains available for future artwork replacement.
releaseName: AIR-DROW Export Preview & Save Polish Edition
summary: A complete local drawing source package with protected no-download export preview, explicit file actions and Android-safe output flow.
releaseChecks: Trusted physical controls are required before any file-producing or destructive action can run.
Raster exports render stored source strokes before any live-canvas snapshot fallback.
The local launch preflight verifies temporary canvas pixels, PNG/JPG encoding and object-URL preparation without opening the camera or downloading a file.
The optional hand guide uses a compact pinch indicator and never appears over active ink.
Hand coordinates cannot paint through palette, toolbar, dock, settings or dialog surfaces.
The PWA page, manifest, source module graph, worker cache namespace and release descriptor use the same v8.3.1 build identity.
